S.FORM: Fred Armisen kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 12, Fred Armisen, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *re* armis~ɕen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *re* armis~ɕen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: *re* armis~ɕen kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *re* armis~ɕen, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
